reason: Authoritative design source: tts crate backends, the !Send constraint (sync command), API sketch, layered-fallback recommendation
Why Web-Speech-only is unsafe on Windows; the voiceschanged-await + zh-CN presence-check pattern that R1 must implement
speak_tts/stop_tts/list_voices command contract, Result<T,E>, generate_handler registration; sync command requirement
tts crate needs no plugin/capability, but confirm nothing extra is granted; guidance if a plugin is added
Keep lib.rs thin; put TTS in its own src-tauri module
VoiceInfo Rust serde shape must match the TS type; command/invoke sync checklist
speech tiering + useVoiceCapability hook; invoke wrapping, async voice loading, StrictMode-safe
Type invoke<VoiceInfo[]>, tier-selection types, no any, import type
One-time dismissible hint state, immutable updates
The install-hint UI follows function-component/props conventions
Build/test gate, forbidden patterns, errors surfaced not swallowed, pure tier fn separated + tested
